channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: 'It doesn’t catch fire': Why China’s "fireproof" sodium battery could be the breakthrough that makes EVs safer than ICE cars
item.description: Chinese researchers develop sodium-ion battery design that forms internal heat barrier to stop thermal runaway reactions linked to battery fires.

item.title: Feeling the heat? The Dyson HushJet Mini Cool Fan is portable, wearable, and will keep you cool anywhere
item.description: Place this compact fan on your desk at work, carry it on public transport, or wear it around your neck to keep you cool at festivals.

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Thursday, April 9 (game #1536)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Thursday, April 9 (game #1033)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Thursday, April 9 (game #767)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: 'Going to schedule my therapist appointment after watching this': HBO Max drops first trailer for new series Half Man and it's already got people feeling nervous
item.description: Baby Reindeer creator Richard Gadd is back with Half Man, and the trailer has got fans preparing for another emotional ride.

item.title: You'll have one more chance to buy Samsung's pricey Galaxy Z TriFold this Friday
item.description: If you missed your chance to pay Samsung $2,900 for a phone earlier this year, we have great news for you. Android Police reported that what may be the final shipment of the Samsung Galaxy Z TriFold will be arriving in the US on April 10. The unique foldable was discontinued a mere three months after it first went on sale, and it seems like Samsung is clearing out whatever inventory it has left. So if you have a spare $3,000 that you're just desperate to get rid of, bookmark the TriFold's page where Samsung has a countdown ticking away. All jokes aside, our hands-on time with the TriFold at CE...

item.title: ‘Good Omens’ Season 3 Is Still Just One Episode, Despite Being Called That
item.description: The Prime Video series returns May 13 for a 'new season' that's really a movie-length single episode.

item.title: Sony is reportedly testing a subtle PS5 UI update — 'Welcome back PS4'
item.description: Sony is apparently testing a new PS5 UI update.

item.title: Conflicting Rulings Leave Anthropic in ‘Supply-Chain Risk’ Limbo
item.description: A US appeals court ruling is at odds with a separate, lower court decision from March, leaving uncertainty about if and how the US military can use the AI company's Claude model.

item.title: Could Google Gemini surpass ChatGPT as the biggest AI chatbot within a year? If it maintains its current growth trajectory, I wouldn't bet against it
item.description: Google's chatbot nearly quadrupled market share in twelve months while ChatGPT cooled slowly, setting up a potential leadership battle by 2027.

item.title: Steam Gaming Has Arrived on Apple Vision Pro, and It’s Unexpectedly Glorious
item.description: Valve's Steam Link app is the easiest way to mirror your PC on Vision Pro. Yes, really.

item.title: This $150 2-in-1 device can replace your laptop and tablet
item.description: This ASUS Chromebook pulls double duty for an affordable price.

item.title: This $99.99 AI tool combines writing, images, and more in one app
item.description: Save on 1min.AI for $99.99 (reg. $540) and get a lifetime subscription to an all-in-one AI platform for writing, images, documents, and more.

item.title: WireGuard VPN developer can’t ship software updates after Microsoft locks account
item.description: The popular open source VPN maker is the second high-profile developer to say Microsoft locked his account without notifying him and is blocking their ability to send software updates to users.
